title: Dickbars
quote: Dickovers are a veritable scourge. They’re so common they’re effectively part of the firmament.

title: Tenfold
quote: Tenfold started where my work usually does: with a love of pattern, tools, and the kind of experience that puts you in front of an object and makes you want to know how it works.

title: Code as a Tool of Process
quote: Programming, like writing, is an activity, where one iteratively sharpens what they're doing as they do it.

title: First, Make Me Care
quote: When writing, your first job is this: First, make me care.

title: Backseat Software
quote: When experimentation becomes the primary decision-making tool, a strong product vision becomes optional.

title: I’m Building an Algorithm That Doesn’t Rot Your Brain
description: This has Joshua Ellingson’s work written all over it. (Also, hear hear.)

title: Peels Newsletter Issue #2: It’s Beginning to Look a Lot Like Compost
description: We’ve made it to the end of 2025, and Peels is about to turn one. Here’s a brief update.
